title: hawgleNET
description: An amateur modpack that seeks to improve Adventuring, World Generation and add fun multiplayer features for small groups of players.
body:
hawgleNET is an amateur modpack that I made for a small multiplayer server between me and my friends. I've selected mods that go along with the broad themes of improving adventuring by adding a lot of structures, making the world generation more interesting and adding fun multiplayer features such as the TVs and projectors of [WaterFrames](https://modrinth.com/mod/eBzFuVTM). A bit of client and server optimization is also included.

Please note that I'm not experienced with Minecraft modding. Expect the Modpack to be unoptimized and mods to be outdated. I've cobbled together something that works, and thats pretty much it.
